items.summary: Update the 'Visited' button in frontend/src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx to turn solid green and display 'Visited' text when clicked, calling the useMarkVisited mutation hook to persist the visited status with the authenticated user's Principal and restaurant identifier

Verify frontend/src/pages/RestaurantDetailPage.tsx displays full restaurant information, includes a 5-star interactive rating selector that allows users to select 1-5 stars, and provides a text input field labeled 'My Private Notes' where users can type and save personal notes about what they ate

Add three new restaurant entries to the backend/main.mo restaurant data: (1) Taco Party in Grand Junction with cuisine type 'Mexican', a realistic Grand Junction street address, appropriate coordinates (~39.0639°N 108.5506°W), isHiddenGem set to true, and relevant vibe attributes; (2) Best Slope Coffee in Fruita with cuisine type 'Cafe', a realistic Fruita street address, appropriate coordinates (~39.1586°N 108.7287°W), isHiddenGem set to true, and relevant vibe attributes; (3) Bin 707 Foodbar in Grand Junction with cuisine type 'Fine Dining', a realistic Grand Junction street address, appropriate coordinates (~39.0639°N 108.5506°W), isHiddenGem set to true, and relevant vibe attributes
